name: boresha-mama
description: Mobile and Web-Based Maternal Healthcare System for Trans-Nzoia County, Kenya

scripts.db:reset: cd backend && node -e "const {Pool}=require('pg');const p=new Pool({host:process.env.DB_HOST||'localhost',port:process.env.DB_PORT||5432,database:process.env.DB_NAME||'boresha_mama',user:process.env.DB_USER||'postgres',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD});p.query('DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS public CASCADE;CREATE SCHEMA public;').then(()=>{console.log('DB reset OK');process.exit(0)}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1)}) "
